text:
3l3d3p is giving pure futuristic vibes with tracks that slam hard, shake your soul, and make your brain do a backflip. This isn’t just music—it’s a glitchcore revolution dripping with raw emotion and unmatched creative chaos. Let’s break down the madness one track at a time. 🎧✨

Essential tracks!:

- Ibitbt: This one hits like a glitchy emotional breakdown served with unapologetic energy. Lyrics like “You get it or you don’t” feel like a challenge—are you ready to dive into the chaos? The warped beats pull you into a whirlwind of doubt and defiance, while the repetitive vocals build intensity like a mantra for survival. The blend of distorted sounds and introspective lyrics creates a powerful vibe that’s impossible to ignore. listen here 🎶 https://open.spotify.com/track/2xUJ4frQcK7zBbJSr1GcUY

- HNNi: Sweet, sticky, and hypnotic! This track mixes sugary vibes with an undercurrent of toxic tension. The line “I’m full of honey, you’re full of slime” is the perfect duality of love and betrayal, wrapped up in warped beats and glitchy synths. The repetitive “do it again” bridges make it feel like an infinite loop of emotions. It’s pure sonic honey with a bitter twist. Turn it up 🎶 https://open.spotify.com/track/3YXYnqaPul274uiB7IQPrD

- fckfckfck: This is the sonic equivalent of screaming into the void. Every beat feels like a punch to the gut, and the rawness of the chorus is cathartic AF. “You can’t bring me down” is the ultimate declaration of rebellion. This track feels like a sweaty underground rave where everyone’s letting go of their darkest thoughts. Absolute chaos in the best way possible. listen here 🎶 https://open.spotify.com/track/5Da7wKV6kcA7pwOIrvFWT5

- idontlisten: Pure anti-conformity energy. The hook “I don’t listen to what they say” is a big middle finger to the haters and the system. The melody loops hypnotically, pulling you into a trance while the lyrics shout independence. This one’s for the free spirits who refuse to walk anyone else’s path. vibe here 🎶 https://open.spotify.com/track/7cf9qRWnoR3FwlLAO3h0AR

- Trgdy Plybck: Tragic but magical, this song feels like falling apart and loving every second of it. The eerie beats and haunting vocal delivery make it feel like a dystopian lullaby. Lyrics like “Acting so dumb when you’re trying to be smart” hit deep, calling out performative actions in the most poetic way. A surreal masterpiece. get into it 🎶 https://open.spotify.com/track/5rQrQpvX4oZJBcdj0hCeve

- Plygrnd: Welcome to 3l3d3p’s playground, where the rules don’t exist, and chaos reigns supreme. The warped, trippy beats make it feel like stepping into another dimension. The line “This is my playground, you gotta come play with me” invites you to lose yourself in the madness. It’s a cosmic playground for your mind. listen here 🎶 https://open.spotify.com/track/5y24m26IolBw2vOGHjgdBm

- sry: Bang, bang—this track is a sonic bullet. The relentless energy and unapologetic lyrics scream rebellion, while the distorted production adds a gritty texture. Lines like “Something’s up with me, I’m not sorry” make it clear—this track is for those who live on their own terms. feel it 🎶 https://open.spotify.com/track/1iEG3HSlMj4JexBRrRVhHd

- D!RT: This is a dirty, grimy anthem for anyone who’s been through the trenches and come out shining. The repetitive “treading through the trenches” feels like a mantra for resilience, while the glitchy beats make it an industrial masterpiece. The raw emotion in this track is undeniable. dig in 🎶 https://open.spotify.com/track/2UCfJzAGVXSlInqEpd9nPe

3l3d3p isn’t here to play—they’re tearing down boundaries and building a new world where vulnerability, rebellion, and chaos coexist. Every track is an invitation to step into their wild, glitchy universe. Turn up the volume, lose yourself in the beats, and let the madness take over. 🌟🔥
